js.category: function getCategory() { return [ { id: 'wpcz', name: '今日推荐' }, { id: 'lpjp', name: '撸片精品' }, { id: 'meiridasai', name: '每日大赛' }, { id: 'rdsj', name: '吃瓜爆料' }, { id: 'lljx', name: '伦理精选' }, { id: 'xsxy', name: '学生校园' }, { id: 'tynd', name: '体育男大' }, { id: 'smtt', name: '色漫天堂' }, { id: 'whhl', name: '网红黑料' }, { id: 'ysyl', name: '看片娱乐' }, { id: 'cqdb', name: '超前点播' }, { id: 'qubk', name: '奇趣百科' }, { id: '51yc', name: '51原创' }, { id: 'dyds', name: '短剧影视' } ]; }
js.home: function getHome(page) { try { page = page || 1; var url = page == 1 ? 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/' : 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/' + page + '/'; var html = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); var list = []; var articleRegex = /<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g; var match; while ((match = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { var link = match[1]; var title = match[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); var pic = match[3] || match[4] || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png'; if (title && !title.includes('广告') && link) { list.push({ vod_id: link, vod_name: title, vod_pic: pic, vod_remarks: '吃瓜爆料', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } return JSON.stringify({ page: page, pagecount: 1232, list: list }); } catch (e) { return JSON.stringify({ page: page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }); } }
js.detail: function getDetail(id) { try { var baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; var url = id.indexOf('http') === 0 ? id : baseUrl + id; var html = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); var title = ''; var titleMatch = html.match(/<h1[^>]*class="post-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h1>/); if (!titleMatch) titleMatch = html.match(/<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/); if (titleMatch) title = titleMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); var pic = ''; var picMatch = html.match(/<meta[^>]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"/); if (picMatch) pic = picMatch[1]; var videoUrl = ''; // 直接从DPlayer配置中提取视频地址 var dplayerMatch = html.match(/data-config='([\s\S]*?)'\s*>/); if (dplayerMatch) { try { var dplayerConfig = JSON.parse(dplayerMatch[1].replace(/"/g, '"')); if (dplayerConfig.video && dplayerConfig.video.url) { videoUrl = dplayerConfig.video.url; } } catch (e) {} } // 如果没有DPlayer，尝试正则匹配视频链接 if (!videoUrl) { var videoRegex = /(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:m3u8|mp4|flv)[^"'\s]*)/gi; var videoMatch = html.match(videoRegex); if (videoMatch) videoUrl = videoMatch[0]; } var playUrl = ''; if (videoUrl) { playUrl = '在线播放$' + videoUrl; } else { playUrl = '在线播放$' + url; } return JSON.stringify({ vod_id: id, vod_name: title || '51视频', vod_pic: pic || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '点击播放', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: playUrl, vod_content: '热门吃瓜爆料视频' }); } catch (e) { return JSON.stringify({ vod_id: id, vod_name: '51视频', vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '加载失败', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: '在线播放$' + id, vod_content: '加载失败' }); } }
js.search: function getSearch(keyword, page) { try { page = page || 1; var encodedKeyword = encodeURIComponent(keyword); var url = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/?s=' + encodedKeyword; if (page > 1) url = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net/page/' + page + '/?s=' + encodedKeyword; var html = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); var list = []; var articleRegex = /<article[\s\S]*?<a\s+href="([^"]+)"[\s\S]*?<h2[^>]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>[\s\S]*?(?:background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)|<img[^>]*src="([^"]+)")[\s\S]*?<\/article>/g; var match; while ((match = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { var link = match[1]; var title = match[2].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); var pic = match[3] || match[4] || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png'; if (title && link) { list.push({ vod_id: link, vod_name: title, vod_pic: pic, vod_remarks: '搜索结果', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } return JSON.stringify({ page: page, pagecount: 1, list: list }); } catch (e) { return JSON.stringify({ page: page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }); } }
